title: Test after fix
description: As a developer, I want to run comprehensive tests after implementing a fix so that I can verify the issue is resolved and no regressions were introduced.

acceptanceCriteria.description: Given a fix has been implemented, when I run the existing test suite, then all previously passing tests should continue to pass
Given a fix addresses a specific bug, when I run tests that reproduce the original issue, then those tests should now pass
Given the fix is complete, when I run regression tests, then no new failures should be introduced in related functionality

tasks.description: Run specific tests for the fixed issue
